title: Energizing Slovak Tofu Stir-fry
description: A peppery, creamy stir-fry featuring tofu, fresh vegetables and a touch of yogurt, served over toasted bread for a satisfying solo dinner.
instructions: Press tofu to remove excess moisture and cut into 1-inch cubes.
Heat a kadhai over medium heat, add sesame oil, and sauté minced garlic until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add tofu cubes and stir-fry until lightly browned on all sides, approximately 4 minutes.
Transfer browned tofu to a plate and set aside.
In the same kadhai, add diced bell pepper, zucchini, carrot, and onion, and stir-fry for 5 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Return tofu to the pan, pour in soy sauce, lemon juice, smoked paprika, black pepper, and a pinch of salt, tossing to coat evenly, then simmer for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat, stir in Greek yogurt to create a creamy sauce, and top with toasted almonds for crunch.
Serve the stir-fry over toasted bread slices and enjoy.
